project.name: Peutui :: Storage API
project.description: Generic key/value + blob StorageBackend strategy with three ready-made implementations: local filesystem, local JDBC database (works with any DataSource - SQLite, H2, Postgres, ...), and a generic REST/S3-style cloud backend. peutui-session-api and peutui-settings-api can both be layered on top of whichever backend a host application configures.
